emergency_definition: active flooding that cannot be isolated or turned off
raw sewage backing up into the house
no hot water (only if there is an infant or elderly person in the house)

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Send urgent SMS to the Batphone and owner Mike if voicemail is reached

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Clara takes a message and has office manager Jenny call the customer back first thing in the morning

integration_constraints: Integrate directly with Housecall Pro for booking routine services and creating customer profiles
after_hours_flow_summary: After-hours calls trigger emergency routing; if non-emergency, Clara takes a message and office manager Jenny will call back in the morning. After-hours emergency fee is $350.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours, Clara handles calls, transfers to Jenny if the customer demands to speak to a human, otherwise processes routine plumbing requests.
questions_or_unknowns: Dedicated Clara phone number not provided
Email address for notifications not provided
notes: Standard dispatch fee is $69 (waived if customer approves work). After-hours emergency fee is $350. Annual tank flush costs $149.
